title: piper neesii
intro: Piper neesii, also known as Indian long pepper, is a flowering plant in the family Piperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of piper neesii include its potential to aid digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce pain. In herbal preparations, piper neesii is often used in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and can also be added to food as a spice to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
